q: Is this service safe to use?
a: Yes, our tool operates entirely on the client-side. No sensitive data is transmitted to our servers during the extraction process. We prioritize user security and transparency.
Our PowerShell-based utility interacts with local player files to safely retrieve necessary session information without requiring your password. It's designed to be fast and efficient.

q: Do I need any special requirements?
a: You just need a standard Windows environment with PowerShell enabled (which is default on most systems). No additional software or complex setup is required.
